name: OpenAI Library and Academy Adapter
purpose: Teach Octomind OS to use OpenAI official learning resources, docs, cookbook patterns, SDKs, agents, tools, evals and academy content as source material for system improvement.

use_for: small business and organization education ideas
rules: Extract concepts into experiments, not tutorials for the operator.
Convert events/content into OS tasks, offer angles, and wedge hypotheses.
Do not make the operator manually study content unless they explicitly ask.
Use docs before guessing API behavior.
Prefer connector/cloud execution before local execution.
Apply safety, evals and observability before marking agents production-ready.
Adapt examples into Octomind OS modules.
Do not copy blindly; convert into measurable experiments.
Record every borrowed pattern as an OS experiment or kernel improvement.

os_modules_to_create.job: Find Academy content/events relevant to small business, AI operations, Codex, agents and revenue automation.
Translate official Cookbook patterns into Octomind OS experiments, not operator homework.
Check OpenAI official docs before API architecture or agent claims.
Turn every agent into a measurable workflow with pass/fail criteria.

reality_rules: OpenAI docs are not revenue by themselves.
Academy learning is not progress unless converted into a shipped experiment or offer improvement.
Cookbook examples are not product unless deployed, measured, and connected to money or evidence.
No local Mac tasks for operator.
next_system_actions: Create OpenAI Academy learning queue as OS tasks.
Add eval-first rule to Revenue Agent Mesh.
Create RAG plan for official docs and project canon once a cloud storage/search connector is available.
